name: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement Ltd.
h1: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement's GCC footprint in India
lede: Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Kochi, covering SSC and CoE, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
